snippet.title: The Odyssey | Official New Trailer
snippet.description:
The Odyssey - In Theaters 7 17 26

Christopher Nolan’s next film, The Odyssey, is a mythic action epic shot across the world using brand new IMAX® film technology. The film brings Homer’s foundational saga to IMAX® film screens for the first time and opens in theaters everywhere on July 17, 2026. 

The Odyssey stars Matt Damon, Tom Holland, Anne Hathaway, Robert Pattinson and Lupita Nyong’o, with Zendaya and Charlize Theron.

The Odyssey is produced by Emma Thomas and Christopher Nolan for their company, Syncopy. The executive producer is Thomas Hayslip.

snippet.title: UFC 6 Official Reveal Trailer
snippet.description:
Pre-order UFC® 6 Ultimate Edition to receive 7-day early access and the Iconic Moments Bundle: https://x.ea.com/89093

UFC 6 is powered by fighters. Evolved striking and motion systems bring those UFC stars to life in the Octagon, while new game modes introduce immersive storytelling that makes every fight feel personal. That starts with Markerless Capture, which delivers unprecedented fighter fidelity with authentic locomotion and Signature Strikes, complemented by new fighter bodies built with Sapien Technology that make your favorite UFC superstars truly look, move, and fight like themselves. 

Real-Time Contact brings the impact to the Octagon with Frostbite™ powered ragdoll physics and damage reactions that hurt so good. When you really start dishing out the damage, enter Flow State, which engages an athlete's standout skills in punishing fashion. 

Finally, all-new game modes like Hall of Legends and The Legacy let you experience the stories of UFC greats or carve your own path, from backrooms to the bright lights. Square up and fight your fight.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

snippet.title: PRESLAVA x GALENA - HVASHTAME BAS / Преслава х Галена - Хващаме бас (Official video) | 2026
snippet.description:
#preslava #galena #hvashtamebas #хващамебас

PRESLAVA x GALENA - HVASHTAME BAS / Преслава х Галена - Хващаме бас (Official video) | 2026

All rights reserved | ©️ & ℗ Preslava
Download & Stream: https://orcd.co/hvashtame-bas
Digital Distribution by Virginia Records | The Orchard

“Хващаме бас”

1.
Пиел с други -
ами наздраве!
И влюбен го дава.
Да се жени тогава!
Кола ѝ купува.
Ами нека пътува!
Далеч от мене да върви
на майната си!

Обичал я лудо -
ха, голямо чудо!
И верен на нея.
Със сълзи се смея!
То Малдиви, морета.
Ми от мене билета,
далеч от мене да върви
на майната си!

Със тая ли те смени?
Напук красива бъди!
По-добре е така,
по-добре е сама.
Че е красив, е красив,
кой сега му е крив?!
Да съжалява - глупак е,
не става!

Припев:
Ай, ай, ай, ай,
айде наздраве за тях!
Така като ги гледам,
припадам от смях.
Сто процента пак ще цъфне пред вас
и тази ще му писне - хващаме бас!

Ай, ай, ай,
хайде наздраве за край!
Без него ми е най,
ми е най, най, най.
Сто процента пак ще цъфне пред нас
и тази ще ме мрази - хващаме бас!

2.
Бил ме зарязал -
ха, така ли е казал?!
И бил ме блокирал.
Яко се е филмирал.
Живота върви му.
Тогава кажи му
и той с него да върви
на майната си!

За него ли да рева,
от любов да умра?!
По-добре е така,
по-добре е сама.
Че е красив, е красив,
кой сега му е крив?!
Да съжалява - глупак е,
не става!


Ай, ай,
ай, ай,
хай, ай,
хай, ай,
ааа...

Share my life, take me for what I am

I don't really need to look very much further

I don't wanna hurt anymore
Stay in my arms if you dare
Or must I imagine you there
Don't walk away from me
I have nothing, nothing, nothing
If I don't have you, you, you, you, you

[Verse 2]
You see through, right to the heart of me
You break down my walls with the strength of your love, mm
I never knew love like I've known it with you
Will our memories survive? One I can hold on to

[Pre-Chorus]
I don't really need to look very much further
I don't wanna have to go where you don't follow
I won't hold it back again, this passion inside
I can't run from myself, there's nowhere to hide
Your love, I'll remember forever

[Chorus]
But don't make me close one more door
I don't wanna hurt anymore
Stay in my arms if you dare
Or must I imagine you there
Don't walk away from me
I have nothing, nothing, nothing
Don't make me close one more door
I don't wanna hurt anymore
Stay in my arms if you dare
Or must I imagine you there
Don't walk away from me, no
Don't walk away from me
Don't you dare walk away from me
I have nothing, nothing, nothing
If I don't have you

[Outro]
You
If I don't have you
Oh, you
